kv_transfer.py::class KVCacheStoreRecvingThread(KVTransferThread)  # async load/get 线程：组 key/addr/size→m_store.get→失败块 record_failed_blocks 记 _invalid_block_ids→set_finished_request

K/V 双张量）

vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py::AscendMLAMetadataBuilder(MLACommonMetadataBuilder[AscendMLAMetadata]).build(self, common_prefix_len, common_attn_metadata: AscendCommonAttentionMetadata, fast_build=False) -> AscendMLAMetadata  # 三段装配主入口：split_decodes_and_prefills(回指 ch19) 拆 decode/prefill 后派生 build_chunked_metadata/build_prefill_metadata/build_decode_metadata；build_for_graph_capture 走图捕获

vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py::AscendMLAMetadataBuilder.build_prefill_metadata(...) -> AscendMLAPrefillMetadata / build_decode_metadata(...) -> AscendMLADecodeMetadata / build_chunked_metadata(...) -> ChunkedContextMetadata  # 三段元数据各自装配 actual_seq_lengths_q/kv、block_table、chunked context 的 cu_seq_lens/starts/max_seq_lens

vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py::AscendMLAMetadata(@dataclass)  # MLA 注意力元数据：num_decodes/num_prefills/num_decode_tokens/num_prefill_tokens 四分计数 + prefill: AscendMLAPrefillMetadata|None + decode: AscendMLADecodeMetadata|None；__post_init__ 派生切分；forward 按 num_decodes/num_prefills 分流
vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py::AscendMLAImpl(MLAAttentionImpl)  # 本章 impl_cls（旗舰）：权重吸收 + prefill(MHA 解压)/decode(MQA 吸收) 双路；torch_npu 融合算子最密集；持有 W_UK/W_UV/W_UK_T 吸收权重、q_proj/kv_b_proj/kv_a_layernorm

vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py::AscendMLAImpl.process_weights_after_loading(self, act_dtype: torch.dtype)  # 权重吸收准备：npu_format_cast(kv_b_proj.weight, ACL_FORMAT_FRACTAL_ND).T 后 split 成 W_UK/W_UV，permute W_UK 成右乘 W_UK_T（运行期 bmm 用）；ACL_FORMAT 常量来自 vllm_ascend/utils.py

vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py::AscendMLAImpl._q_proj_and_k_up_proj(self, x) -> (ql_nope, q_pe)  # 运行期吸收核心招式：q_proj(x) 出 q_nope/q_pe，q_nope.transpose 后 torch.bmm(q_nope, W_UK_T) 把 q 上投影吸收进 K 上投影 -> latent 空间 ql_nope（decode 省掉显式解压 K/V）；_v_up_proj 经 npu_transpose_batchmatmul 把 latent 输出投回 V 闭合对称

vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py::AscendMLAImpl._forward_prefill(self, q_nope, q_pe, k_nope, k_pe, value, kv_c_and_k_pe_cache, attn_metadata) -> Tensor  # prefill 主路(MHA 解压)：npu_fused_infer_attention_score(TND) 算当前新 token 注意力，再 _compute_prefill_context 处理 chunked 历史 context

vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py::AscendMLAImpl._compute_prefill_context(self, ...) -> Tensor  # 分块算历史 context 注意力：循环各 chunk 算 (LSE, out)，npu_attention_update(在线 softmax)把各块 (LSE, out) 合并（回指 ch19 fused-infer/LSE 思路）

vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py::AscendMLAImpl._forward_decode(self, q_nope, q_pe, k_nope, k_pe, block_size, attn_metadata, dequant_scale_q_nope=None) -> Tensor  # decode 主路(MQA 吸收)：q 已吸收进 latent（形参名 q_nope 实为吸收后的 ql_nope），对缓存隐向量 k_nope 做 MQA(K=V=k_nope)，npu_fused_infer_attention_score_v2(含 get_max_workspace 预取)，BNSD_NBSD 主线

vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py::AscendMLAImpl.exec_kv_decode/exec_kv_prefill(self, kv_no_split, cos, sin, kv_cache, slots)  # npu_kv_rmsnorm_rope_cache 融合算子一把做 RMSNorm(kv_a_layernorm)+RoPE(k_pe)+写分页 KV cache；decode 取前两返回值(写入 cache 的 kv_c/k_pe), prefill is_output_kv=True 取后两返回值(未量化 KV 供显式解压); cache_mode PA/PA_NZ

vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py::AscendMLAImpl.forward(self, layer_name, hidden_states, kv_cache, attn_metadata: M, need_gather_q_kv=False, output=None) -> Tensor  # 总入口与真实分流处：_mla_preprocess 按 decode/prefill 出两份预处理 -> 分别 _forward_decode(MQA 吸收)/_forward_prefill(MHA 解压) -> 写 o_proj_input 不同切片 -> o_proj
ch21: vllm_ascend/attention/sfa_v1.py::class AscendSFAImpl(MLAAttentionImpl)  # 建在 MLA 之上：继承 ch20 MLAAttentionImpl 复用低秩 KV 压缩/权重吸收，forward 在 MLA prolog 之上叠加 use_sparse_c8_indexer(INT8 索引)+q_hadamard 哈达玛预处理+execute_sparse_flash_attention_process 走 top-2048 稀疏 flash
vllm_ascend/attention/sfa_v1.py::class AscendSFAMetadataBuilder(MLACommonMetadataBuilder[AscendSFAMetadata])  # SFA 元数据装配继承 ch20 的 MLACommonMetadataBuilder（复用 prefill/decode 拆分），非自带

vllm_ascend/attention/dsa_v1.py::class AscendDSAImpl(DSAAttentionImpl)  # DeepSeek Sparse Attention：继承昇腾自有 DSAAttentionImpl(非 vLLM MLAAttentionImpl)，内联重写 MLA 式低秩 prolog；forward 拆 [decode|prefill] 各走 Lightning Indexer 选 top-512 + npu_sparse_attn_sharedkv 稀疏注意力

vllm_ascend/attention/dsa_v1.py::AscendDSAMetadataBuilder.build_prefill_metadata(self, common_prefix_len: int, common_attn_metadata) -> AscendDSAPrefillMetadata  # 调 npu_quant_lightning_indexer_metadata 建 prefill 索引元数据(sparse_count=index_topk=512, sparse_mode=3)

vllm_ascend/attention/dsa_v1.py::AscendDSAMetadataBuilder.build_decode_metadata(self, common_prefix_len: int, common_attn_metadata, num_reqs_actual: int | None) -> AscendDSADecodeMetadata  # decode 分支各自装配 Lightning Indexer 元数据(top-512)

vllm_ascend/attention/device/device_op.py::DeviceOperator = get_device_adaptor()  # 设备算子门面(BaseDeviceAdaptor/A5DeviceAdaptor 代际分发)：reshape_and_cache / kv_cache_load / mla_preprocess_only_decode / execute_sparse_flash_attention_process 等，注意力各章(ch19/ch20/ch21)共用
ch22: vllm_ascend/core/single_type_kv_cache_manager.py::class CompressAttentionManager(FullAttentionManager)  # 压缩 MLA KV：分配/缓存/命中前 token 数 //= compress_ratio，前缀命中按 logical_block_size(=block_size×compress_ratio) 对齐——昇腾对 KV 管理唯一新增 manager

vllm_ascend/core/single_type_kv_cache_manager.py::get_manager_for_kv_cache_spec(kv_cache_spec, block_pool, ...) -> SingleTypeKVCacheManager  # 重映射工厂：复用 vLLM spec_manager_map，仅对 MLAAttentionSpec+compress_ratio>1 改选 CompressAttentionManager 并对齐 admission cap；SWA/ChunkedLocal 因覆盖 vLLM 工厂须重设 cap
vllm_ascend/core/scheduler_dynamic_batch.py::class BudgetRefiner  # 读 profile_table.csv，按 (对齐 ctx_len, decode 请求数) 查表给动态 token 预算；未配 SLO_limits 时 refine_budget 恒等返回
vllm_ascend/core/scheduler_dynamic_batch.py::class SchedulerDynamicBatch(Scheduler)  # 仅两处实质改动：refine_budget 动态调 token_budget + decode-first 重排 self.running；其余 schedule() 逐字复刻父方法

vllm_ascend/core/recompute_scheduler.py::class RecomputeScheduler(Scheduler)  # PD 分离侧（kv_consumer）：allocate 失败→pop+free+回 recomputed_reqs 的丢弃重算分叉；update_from_output 以 stop_reason="recomputed" 回吐请求给 PD proxy
vllm_ascend/core/recompute_scheduler.py::class AsyncRecomputeScheduler(AsyncScheduler, RecomputeScheduler)  # 多继承组合异步调度 + 丢弃重算
vllm_ascend/core/scheduler_profiling_chunk.py::class ProfilingChunkScheduler(Scheduler)  # profiling 期分块调度：启动采样(run_profiling)→ChunkSizePredictor 预测 chunk size，调度控制流与采样解耦
vllm_ascend/core/profiling_chunk_predictor.py::class ChunkSizePredictor  # 二次模型按前向延迟解最优 chunk size（predict/get_time），history 旁路默认关
